channel.title: Merkle tree vulnerabilities on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in Merkle tree vulnerabilities on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: Bitcoin and Privacy Under Attack: Tornado Cash, Samourai Wallet and Fixing the Great Consensus Cleanup
item.description: In this episode of Bitcoin, Explained, Aaron and Sjors discuss the Great Consensus Cleanup Revival soft fork(s). This proposal would fix some known bugs in the Bitcoin protocol, specifically the timewarp vulnerability, large block validation times, 64 byte transactions and BIP 30 verification.
